mentions.note: Natural gas portfolio strong post-merger; Cramer agrees stock undervalued but hesitant after oil's big run. Will buy on pullback if it dips.
Caller Tony asking about Coterra merger; Cramer recommends Devon instead; believes hyperscalers will eventually buy natural gas producer; own Devon directly for this thesis.
Natural gas exposure with strong demand backdrop. 'Buy, plain and simple; exactly what you should be buying right here.'
